text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 7 

CCW_PHARM_ID 

LABEL: CCW Pharmacy Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This is the CCW-assigned pharmacy identification number that is used to uniquely identify pharmacy 
entities. The ID is specific to the CCW and not applicable to any other identification system or data 
source. 

This field also enables linkage between pharmacies in the Part D Event File and the
